pi_items.source: Task specification - synthetic test data describing purpose of workspace
Nuxeo documentation (https://doc.nuxeo.com/nxdoc/document-types/ and https://doc.nuxeo.com/userdoc/document-types-in-web-ui/) confirms 'Workspace' is a valid core document type in Nuxeo platform

Nuxeo documentation (https://doc.nuxeo.com/nxdoc/handling-permissions/ and https://doc.nuxeo.com/userdoc/permissions/) confirms 'ReadWrite' is a valid compound permission group in Nuxeo platform that includes both Read and Write atomic permissions

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a user 'mwilson' (Maria Wilson) with email mwilson@acmecorp.com, company ACME Corporation, and adds them to the 'members' group. A workspace titled 'Maria Wilson Files' with description 'Personal workspace for Maria Wilson - Document Management' is created as a Nuxeo 'Workspace' document type at path /default-domain/workspaces/Maria-Wilson-Files. The user is granted ReadWrite permission (a compound permission including both Read and Write atomic permissions) on the workspace. The Nuxeo platform version 10.10 is used with PostgreSQL 11 database backend. All user and workspace details are synthetic test data created specifically for this task.
